title: The Highland Ritual
short_description: A PSX-style first-person horror game where a ritual hunt in the Scottish highlands unravels into something far darker when not all is as it seems.
description: The Highland Ritual is a PSX Style First-Person horror game. A game where you go on a ritual hunt in the Scottish highlands, but not all is what it seems and soon enough, you're caught up in something dark and sinister.
